message.reasoning:

We'll set macro totals roughly protein 150g (600 cal), carbs 250g (1000 cal), fats 60g (540 cal) => total 2140 need 403 extra maybe from extra carbs/fats. But macro fields maybe approximate; not required to sum exactly? Probably okay but keep close. I'll just set protein 160g, carbs 260g, fats 70g = 640+1040+630=2310 still short 233. Could ignore precision. Probably okay.

But must ensure each day's sum equals 2543. I will craft numbers adding to 2543.

Meal3 500
Meal4 450
Meal5 743 = total 2543.
